name: Past Faerie Knights [MYOS]

THESE SILVER TREE KNIGHTS FROM PAST!!! It's just AU and Headcanon! but they used to be Faerie Knights instead of Silver Tree Knights

Read before roleplay!!!

These are not Silver Tree Knights from current timeline!!! These are from past, when Beast Cookies was Virtues, and Ancient Heroes wasn't born then, Sugarfly Cookie is Silverfly Cookie there, that just my AU, and also, read notes and warning too, got any questions? Ask in comments, I'll try give answer

!!!Notes!!!

1. Faerie Kingdom was just a Faerie home before Virtues become Beasts. And Faerie Knights duty is defend Faerie Kingdom and their kings

  1. Chilli Spice Cookie got bored, but instead of Destruction (like in og) he chose drink alcohol (I'm srry BSC fans), to not to remember the eternal cycle of his life and grief, but he isn't abusive! He is just mean and rude, but a nice and good Cookie inside

  2. White Sapphire Cookie works as librarian in Spire of Knowledge!

  3. Spire of Knowledge is almost like a Blueberry Yogurt Academy
